title: Dynamic Values in Docs don't copy and paste well
excerpt: We have created a Monday doc template that uses dynamic column values to insert data in multiple pre-written communications. This works flawlessly, but we’ve noticed that these fields do not copy and paste well. If you h…

posts.author: OfficeHounds (Maggie Langley)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have created a Monday doc template that uses dynamic column values to insert data in multiple pre-written communications. This works flawlessly, but we’ve noticed that these fields do not copy and paste well. If you highlight text that comes before or after the dynamic column value, it works fine, but let’s say, you just want to copy and paste the person’s last name to enure you spelled it right, it doesn’t always work. It seems to do better if it’s one dynamic field on its own, but if you have First Name Last Name, Job Title. It doesn’t work very well if you try to just copy part of the data.

I know that I can copy the data from the Monday table, but we would love better functioning copy and paste on Monday docs with dynamic fields.

I am using Google Chrome for my browser, and it is updated to the latest version.
